page_content: during each semester, leading up to student teaching during the last Title College Requirements (https://academiccatalog.umd.edu/ undergraduate/colleges-schools/education/ Complete the following with a B- or better: Foundations of Special Education: Inclusive Practices or EDSP211 Complete the following with a C- or better: Introduction to Psychology (HS or NS) 1 Introduction to Sociology 1 or SOCY105 Understanding Contemporary Social Problems - Frameworks for Critical Thinking and Strategies for Solutions HIST200 Interpreting American History: Beginnings to 1877 (HS or HU) 1 HIST201 Interpreting American History: From 1865 to the Present (HS or HU and DVUP) HESP202 Introduction to Hearing and Speech Sciences CHSE376 Fundamentals of Sign Language Elementary Statistics and Probability (AR) 1 Child Growth and Development (HS) or PSYC355 Developmental Psychology Elements of Numbers and Operations Elements of Geometry and Measurement
